/home/lind/lind-wasm/clang+llvm-18.1.8-x86_64-linux-gnu-ubuntu-18.04/bin/clang++ --target=wasm32-unknown-wasi --sysroot=/home/lind/lind-wasm/build/sysroot -frtti -pthread -matomics -mbulk-memory -static -nostdlib -nodefaultlibs -fno-exceptions -stdlib=libc++ -fno-unwind-tables -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wwrite-strings -Wcast-qual -Wdelete-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-comment -O3 -DNDEBUG -static -nostdlib -nodefaultlibs -nostdlib++ -L/home/lind/lind-wasm/libcxx-build/libcxx/benchmarks/benchmark-libcxx/lib -L/home/lind/lind-wasm/libcxx-build/libcxx/benchmarks/benchmark-libcxx/lib64 CMakeFiles/vector_operations_libcxx.dir/vector_operations.bench.cpp.o -o vector_operations.libcxx.out  ../../lib/libc++.a ../../lib/libc++experimental.a -lbenchmark -nostdlib++ ../../lib/libc++.a ../../lib/libc++abi.a -nostdlib++
